2606.12344.title: Claw-SWE-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating OpenClaw-style Agent Harnesses on Coding Tasks
2606.12344.paper_summary: General-purpose agents such as OpenClaw are increasingly used as autonomous tool users, but their coding ability is difficult to measure under SWE-bench: a generic agent does not by itself satisfy the clean Docker workspace, patch, and prediction contract required for scoring. We introduce Claw-SWE-Bench, a multilingual SWE-bench-style benchmark and adapter protocol that makes heterogeneous agent harnesses, or claws, comparable under fair settings including a fixed prompt, runtime budget, workspace contract, patch extraction procedure, and evaluator. The full benchmark contains 350 GitHub issue-resolution instances across 8 languages and 43 repositories, drawn from SWE-bench-Multilingual and SWE-bench-Verified-Mini after future-commit cleanup. We also release Claw-SWE-Bench Lite for faster validation, which is an 80-instance subset selected by a cost-aware, rank-aware procedure over 17 calibration columns. On the full benchmark, OpenClaw with a minimal direct-diff adapter scores only $19.1\%$ Pass@1, whereas the full adapter reaches $73.4\%$ with the same GLM 5.1 backbone, showing that adapter design is essential for enabling OpenClaw-style harnesses to perform coding tasks effectively. Across an OpenClaw $\times$ nine-model sweep and a five-claw $\times$ two-model sweep, model choice changes Pass@1 by $29.4$ pp and harness choice by $27.4$ pp under fixed models; systems with similar accuracy can differ substantially in total API cost. Claw-SWE-Bench therefore treats harness and cost accounting as first-class axes of SWE-style coding-agent evaluation, providing both a full benchmark and a low-cost reference set for reproducible comparison. The data is available at https://github.com/opensquilla/claw-swe-bench and https://huggingface.co/datasets/TokenRhythm/Claw-SWE-Bench.
2606.12344.paper_summary_zh: 一般用途的代理，例如 OpenClaw，越來越多地被用作自主工具使用者，但它們的編碼能力在 SWE-bench 下很難衡量：一個通用代理本身並不滿足評分所需的乾淨 Docker 工作空間、補丁和預測合約。我們介紹了 Claw-SWE-Bench，一個多語言的 SWE-bench 風格基準和適配器協議，使異構代理裝置或爪子在公平的設置下可比，包括固定提示、運行時間預算、工作空間合約、補丁提取程序和評估者。完整的基準包含來自 SWE-bench-Multilingual 和 SWE-bench-Verified-Mini 的 350 個 GitHub 問題解決實例，涵蓋 8 種語言和 43 個庫，經過未來提交清理後獲得。我們還發布了 Claw-SWE-Bench Lite 以加快驗證，這是一個由 17 個校準列的成本感知、排名感知程序選出的 80 個實例子集。在完整基準中，使用最小直接差異適配器的 OpenClaw 只得到了 $19.1\%$ 的 Pass@1，而完整適配器在相同的 GLM 5.1 主幹下達到了 $73.4\%$，顯示適配器設計對於使 OpenClaw 風格的裝置有效執行編碼任務至關重要。在 OpenClaw $\times$ 九模型掃描和五爪 $\times$ 兩模型掃描中，模型選擇使 Pass@1 變化了 $29.4$ pp，而裝置選擇在固定模型下變化了 $27.4$ pp；具有相似準確度的系統在總 API 成本上可能有顯著差異。因此，Claw-SWE-Bench 將裝置和成本核算視為 SWE 風格編碼代理評估的第一級軸心，提供完整的基準和可重複比較的低成本參考集。數據可在 https://github.com/opensquilla/claw-swe-bench 和 https://huggingface.co/datasets/TokenRhythm/Claw-SWE-Bench 獲得。
2606.12344.author: Mengyu Zheng et.al.
2606.12344.authors: Mengyu Zheng, Kai Han, Boxun Li, Haiyang Xu, Yuchuan Tian, Wei He, Hang Zhou, Jianyuan Guo, Hailin Hu, Lin Ma, Chao Xu, Guohao Dai, Lixue Xia, Yunchao Wei, Yunhe Wang, Yu Wang
